title: SRS — Purpose & Scope
description: Foundational charter for SRS: the single reason it exists, the two responsibilities it holds, the deeper goal of hierarchy-free human-AI collaboration, the initial collaboration-context use case, an explicit in/out-of-scope boundary against scope creep, and the six high-level implementation patterns (field, type, record, container, relation, view). Authored with an explicit Purpose facet per section so it can be migrated into a spec section family.
processingNote: Authored directly as a single document, staged for migration into SRS records. Each section carries Title / Purpose / Content facets; Purpose requires a new section-purpose field on migration.
